nijisanji.name: Kuzuha
nijisanji.short_bio: A vampire-themed VTuber known for competitive gaming streams and relaxed personality. He became the first Nijisanji member and first male VTuber in Japan to surpass 2 million subscribers.

nijisanji.name: Kanae
nijisanji.short_bio: A popular Nijisanji male VTuber known for relaxed talk streams and FPS gameplay. Frequently collaborates with Kuzuha as the duo ChroNoiR.

nijisanji.name: Hyakumantenbara Salome
nijisanji.short_bio: An 'ojou-sama' (rich lady) style VTuber who became famous for reaching 1 million subscribers in just two weeks after debut.

nijisanji.name: Tsukino Mito
nijisanji.short_bio: One of the earliest Nijisanji VTubers, known as the 'Class President'. Famous for creative content and unusual stream topics.

nijisanji.name: Hoshikawa Sara
nijisanji.short_bio: A bright and energetic VTuber known for gaming streams and collaborations with other Nijisanji members.

nijisanji.name: Sasaki Saku
nijisanji.short_bio: A gamer VTuber known for competitive gameplay and humorous personality.

nijisanji.name: Ange Katrina
nijisanji.short_bio: A mage-themed VTuber known for energetic streams and collaborations.

nijisanji.name: Inui Toko
nijisanji.short_bio: A VTuber with strong singing ability and calm personality, known for music and karaoke streams.

nijisanji.name: Fuwa Minato
nijisanji.short_bio: A charismatic host-style VTuber known for singing streams and energetic personality.

nijisanji.name: Vox Akuma
nijisanji.short_bio: A demon VTuber from Nijisanji EN known for deep voice acting, roleplay streams, and strong international fanbase.
